summary: Comprehensive testing of Deposit Approval Screenshot Upload feature completed. All 7 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend testing verified complete deposit approval flow with mandatory screenshot requirement. Feature works correctly for both deposits and withdrawals.
passed_tests: Backend: Upload-proof endpoint works for deposits (POST /api/transactions/{id}/upload-proof)
Backend: Deposit approval requires proof - returns 400 without accountant_proof_image
Backend: Deposit approval succeeds after proof is uploaded
Backend: Approved deposit has accountant_proof_image field in response
Backend: Accountant role can approve deposits with proof
Backend: Withdrawal approval requires source account - returns 400 without source_account_id
Backend: Pending deposits appear in pending transactions endpoint
Frontend: Deposit approval dialog appears when clicking Approve on a deposit
Frontend: Deposit dialog shows 'APPROVE DEPOSIT' title
Frontend: Deposit dialog shows transaction details (reference, amount, client)
Frontend: Deposit dialog shows 'DEPOSITING TO' section with destination account
Frontend: Deposit dialog has 'PROOF OF DEPOSIT (SCREENSHOT) *' mandatory upload field
Frontend: Continue to Approve button is DISABLED without screenshot
Frontend: After uploading screenshot, button becomes ENABLED
Frontend: Screenshot preview is displayed after upload
Frontend: Captcha verification appears before final approval
Frontend: Transaction approved successfully after captcha
Frontend: Transactions page shows teal image icon indicator for approved transactions with proof
Frontend: View dialog shows 'ACCOUNTANT APPROVAL PROOF' section with thumbnail
Frontend: Proof thumbnail shows upload metadata (date, uploaded by)
Frontend: Withdrawal approval dialog shows 'APPROVE WITHDRAWAL' title
Frontend: Withdrawal dialog shows 'SENDING TO' section with client bank details
Frontend: Withdrawal dialog has 'SOURCE ACCOUNT (WHERE FUNDS COME FROM) *' selector
Frontend: Withdrawal dialog has 'PROOF OF PAYMENT (SCREENSHOT) *' upload field
seed_data_creation: Test transactions created during testing with TEST_ prefix for deposit and withdrawal approval flows
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deposit approval screenshot feature fully tested. Key features: 1) Deposit approval dialog (similar to withdrawal) requires mandatory screenshot upload. 2) POST /api/transactions/{id}/upload-proof works for deposits and withdrawals. 3) POST /api/transactions/{id}/approve requires accountant_proof_image for deposits and source_account_id for withdrawals. 4) Approved transactions show accountant_proof_image in Transactions page with teal icon indicator. 5) View dialog shows thumbnail preview with upload metadata.

deposit_approval_dialog.title: APPROVE DEPOSIT
deposit_approval_dialog.transaction_details: Shows reference, amount, client, type badge
deposit_approval_dialog.depositing_to_section: Shows destination treasury account name and bank
deposit_approval_dialog.button_disabled_state: Continue to Approve disabled until screenshot uploaded
deposit_approval_dialog.preview: Shows uploaded image preview with Remove button

withdrawal_approval_dialog.title: APPROVE WITHDRAWAL
withdrawal_approval_dialog.transaction_details: Shows reference, amount, client, type badge
withdrawal_approval_dialog.sending_to_section: Shows client bank details (bank name, account name, number, currency)
withdrawal_approval_dialog.source_account_field: SOURCE ACCOUNT (WHERE FUNDS COME FROM) * - required selector
withdrawal_approval_dialog.button_disabled_state: Continue to Approve disabled until source account selected AND screenshot uploaded

transactions_page.proof_indicator: Teal image icon next to reference for transactions with accountant_proof_image
transactions_page.view_dialog: Shows ACCOUNTANT APPROVAL PROOF section with thumbnail preview
transactions_page.thumbnail_preview: data-testid='accountant-proof-thumbnail' - clickable to view full size

backend_endpoints.upload_proof: POST /api/transactions/{id}/upload-proof - works for both deposits and withdrawals
backend_endpoints.approve: POST /api/transactions/{id}/approve - requires accountant_proof_image for deposits, source_account_id for withdrawals
backend_endpoints.pending: GET /api/transactions/pending - returns pending deposits and withdrawals

data_testid_attributes_verified.approval_source_account: [data-testid='approval-source-account'] - source account selector in withdrawal dialog
